nodes.title: Epic: Orphaned outcome
nodes.description:
Deliver one slice but claim two.

## Outcome Trace
- PLAN-OWNED: maintainer | CLI | run | report | read | failure | evidence | Task 1, final Task 1.
- PLAN-ORPHAN: auditor | CLI | audit | audit log | read | denied | security evidence | no owner.

## Success Criteria
- Both outcomes pass.

nodes.title: Task 1: Final owned slice
nodes.description:
Deliver the owned outcome.

## Context
- Product contract: `docs/product/x.md` revision 1.
- Spec: `docs/specs/x.md`.
- Outcome IDs: PLAN-OWNED.
- External ref: None.
- Why this slice exists: deliver a report.

## Outcome
- Actor / entry interface: maintainer runs `report`.
- Observable result: report is shown.
- Durable result / find-again path: report is saved and readable.
- Denied/failure/recovery result: failure preserves prior data.

## Domain Contract
- Reports are atomic.

## Files
- Create: `src/report.py`.

## Resources
- Allowed write set: `src/report.py`.
- Exclusive resources: report.
- Capacity resources: None.

## Interfaces
- Produces: REPORT-API.
- Consumes: None.
- Hard ordering constraints: None.
- `report() -> Report`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- PLAN-OWNED passes at the CLI.

## Integration Checkpoint
- Run `pytest tests/test_report.py` against the CLI and store.

## Implementation Notes
1. Test and implement the report.
